revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24744680692|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Himukahino Shrine
| native_name = 神坐日向神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Himukahino Shrine
| coordinates = {{coord|34.527017|135.852844}}
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Himukahino Shrine'''|神坐日向神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|lt=Shikinai Taisha|en|Shikinai Taisha|ja|式内大社|simple|Shikinai Taisha|qid=Q134917288|1=Shikinai Taisha}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Subshrine|lt=Shikinai Subshrine|qid=Q135100459|1=Shikinai Subshrine}}
* {{ill|Q135009904|ltq=Q135009904|qid=Q135009904|1=Sessha}}
* {{ill|Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings|lt=Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings|qid=Q135009132|1=Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings}}
* {{ill|Q135160338|ltq=Q135160338|qid=Q135160338|1=Kanpei-sha}}
* {{ill|Q135026601|ltq=Q135026601|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Ōmiwa Shrine|lt=Ōmiwa Shrine|ar|معبد أوميوا|en|Ōmiwa Shrine|fa|معبد اومیوا|fr|Ōmiwa-jinja|id|Kuil Ōmiwa|ja|大神神社|la|Templum Ōmiwa|my|အိုးမိဝကျောင်းတော်|ru|Оомива-дзиндзя|simple|Ōmiwa Shrine|zh|大神神社|qid=Q705542|1=Ōmiwa Shrine}}

** Series ordinal: 119
** P155: {{ill|Ōmiwa Shrine|lt=Ōmiwa Shrine|ar|معبد أوميوا|en|Ōmiwa Shrine|fa|معبد اومیوا|fr|Ōmiwa-jinja|id|Kuil Ōmiwa|ja|大神神社|la|Templum Ōmiwa|my|အိုးမိဝကျောင်းတော်|ru|Оомива-дзиндзя|simple|Ōmiwa Shrine|zh|大神神社|qid=Q705542|1=Ōmiwa Shrine}}
